CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Continued To Feb-05-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2019 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ARIF GAMAL, CONTRA COSTA COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. The court will execute the proposed order.

Order is signed.*** (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

***After all the cases have been called and the Court has adjourned for the morning, the Plaintiff appears late at 10:12 am. The Court speaks to the Plaintiff off-the record.***
